step_by_step_thinking:
Brittle bone syndrome is caused by improper synthesis of procollagen.
\boxed{A} Based on the evidence provided, brittle bone syndrome (specifically referring to osteogenesis imperfecta here) is directly linked to issues in the synthesis or processing of type I collagen, which falls under improper synthesis of procollagen. Therefore, option A accurately reflects the underlying cause of brittle bone syndrome.
